title: Xiaohongshu Vertical Process Flow Card AI
sourceTitle: Xiaohongshu Vertical Process Flow Card AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 3:4 Xiaohongshu vertical process-flow knowledge card for 把日常观察写成一篇文章, built around a fixed six-step editorial flow structure. Subject: 捕捉一个瞬间, 问它为什么重要, 找到共同经验, 写出一个判断, 补充一个例子, 收束成标题 become the six stacked process nodes, each with a number, short title, one-sentence explanation, and small icon while keeping the same professional vertical-flow layout. Scene: Clean light-paper knowledge-card surface with dark gray Chinese text, blue-green vertical flow line, orange step numbers, restrained icon set, and warm editorial clarity. Composition: Fixed 3:4 vertical process card: top topic title, six steps arranged from top to bottom, each step containing a number, short heading, concise explanation, and small icon, connected by a continuous blue-green flow line with orange number markers. Signature Elements: 把日常观察写成一篇文章, 捕捉一个瞬间, 问它为什么重要, 找到共同经验, 写出一个判断, 补充一个例子, 收束成标题, six vertical process nodes, orange numbered markers, blue-green connector line, small icons, clean paper background, and professional editorial knowledge-card finish. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Light paper background, dark gray typography, blue-green process line, orange numbering accents, soft gray dividers, and restrained neutral icon fills. Lighting: Flat clean digital-paper lighting with subtle card shadow, crisp text contrast, and calm mobile readability. Typography: Chinese professional process labels appear as readable Chinese process labels, short headings, and one-sentence step explanations; Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.
